title: Salinity
description: A New Cave Biome, a New Armor, a New Mob, and more.
body:
![Salinity (Title)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/258a0d321e0103cdd6734d3bdd2c61fa3241f802_0.webp)


## A Vanilla-Friendly Mod that adds a New Cave Biome, a New Armor, New Tools, a New Mob, new Food, and much more.


The Salty Cave is a new Cave Biome that appear under large Mountains, there you can find Salt, wich when combined with Copper Ingots forms Salar Ingots, a new Material, similar to diamond, but with the ability to increase speed and damage when the user gets damaged.

But beware, because there is also the Hot Rod Creeper, a variant of the Creeper with an even more dangerous explosion.


![Salty Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e2b00727b5f49107a3f0e9cc9fed14b9fc2440_0.webp)

![Salty Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa20e2d8fdde582f6940037cd7141a0076c396f2_0.webp)
